summary: PR 2368 attempted to match sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c by changing spline helper storage classes, adding a small arc-length dx helper, adjusting local variable shape in splArcLengthGetParameter, changing related .sdata2 symbol labels, removing one now-static header prototype, and marking spline.c as Matching in configure.py. The bot report claimed splArcLengthGetParameter and spline .sdata2 reached 100%, but the PR body and review discussion are absent and the PR is closed with no merged_at timestamp.

key_files.role: Main decomp source change: helper linkage/inline adjustments, new spl_GetArcLengthDx helper, and local/control-expression reshaping in splArcLengthGetParameter.
Header cleanup: removed splGetBSplinePoint prototype after the function was made static in spline.c.
Build configuration change: changed sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Symbol metadata change: renamed spline .sdata2 float/double symbols from HSD_Spline_804DE620-style globals to @number labels at the same addresses.

what_changed.text: Marked Object(Matching, "sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c") in configure.py, replacing Object(NonMatching, ...).
Changed splGetCardinalPoint and splGetBezierPoint from plain void functions to inline void functions.
Changed splGetBSplinePoint to static void and removed its public prototype from spline.h.
Changed splArcLengthPolynomial from inline f32 to static f32.
Added static f32 spl_GetArcLengthDx(f32 start, f32 midpoint), returning (midpoint - start) / 8.0F.

In splArcLengthGetParameter, moved result declaration after start/end, replaced const midpoint with result, split dx and middle declarations from initializers, and used spl_GetArcLengthDx for dx calculation.
Changed twelve .sdata2 labels at 0x804DE620 through 0x804DE654 from HSD_Spline_804DE620-style names to @13, @14, @15, @17, @18, @19, @80, @82, @91, @101, @178, and @179.
Bot report claimed +912 matched-code bytes, +2268 linked-code bytes, +56 matched-data bytes, and two new matches: splArcLengthGetParameter and main/sysdolphin/baselib/spline .sdata2.

smart_moves.text: Kept header surface consistent with function linkage by removing splGetBSplinePoint from spline.h when the function became static.
Used a narrow helper, spl_GetArcLengthDx, for one repeated arithmetic expression instead of broad rewrites across spline.c.
Limited source edits to spline.c/spline.h while pairing the claimed match with configure.py and symbols.txt metadata updates.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a nearly matched function, storage-class and inline decisions on nearby helpers can be part of the matching surface; synchronize headers when a helper becomes file-local.

Small expression extraction and local declaration reshaping can affect MWCC output for numeric search/integration code; in this PR, extracting dx calculation and reusing result replaced a const midpoint local in splArcLengthGetParameter.

When symbol metadata for anonymous float/double constants is part of a match, labels may need to reflect local @number constants rather than speculative semantic HSD_Spline_ address names; verify section ownership before promoting such renames.

naming_conventions.text: This diff used numeric @ labels for spline .sdata2 constants at fixed addresses instead of HSD_Spline_804DE620-style semantic/address names.
The added helper name spl_GetArcLengthDx follows the existing spline-local spl_ prefix style visible near spl_IterateSimpsonsMiddle and spl_GetCoeffs references in the diff.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Toggle helper linkage/inline qualifiers to influence emitted code: inline for splGetCardinalPoint and splGetBezierPoint, static for splGetBSplinePoint and splArcLengthPolynomial.
Introduce a tiny static helper for dx calculation to alter call/expression shape around Simpson integration code.
Adjust local declaration order and const-ness in splArcLengthGetParameter, including replacing midpoint with result and delaying dx/middle initialization.
Update .sdata2 symbol labels alongside code matching work; bot report tied spline .sdata2 to a new 100% match.

notes: Diff evidence is complete and directly supports changed files and code/symbol edits.
PR body is empty and there are no review comments or reviews in the loaded slice.
Bot report provides verification-like evidence for new matches, but no local build log, objdiff output, reviewer acceptance, or merge record is present.
PR state is CLOSED with merged_at null, so intake must not treat the configure.py Matching status or symbol-label changes as accepted current-source facts.

accepted_candidate_records.title: File-local helper changes should be reflected in headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2368 made splGetBSplinePoint static in spline.c and removed its prototype from spline.h, showing a narrow header cleanup paired with recovered file-local linkage.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Tiny helper extraction and local-shape edits for MWCC numeric code
accepted_candidate_records.text: In splArcLengthGetParameter, this PR replaced a const midpoint local with result, split dx/middle declarations, and introduced spl_GetArcLengthDx; the bot report then claimed splArcLengthGetParameter reached 100%. Treat as a tactic candidate requiring objdiff-level corroboration before generalization.

source_update_candidates.title: Verify whether sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c became Matching
source_update_candidates.text: The PR diff changes configure.py from Object(NonMatching, "sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c") to Object(Matching, "sysdolphin/baselib/spline.c"), and the bot report claims splArcLengthGetParameter and spline .sdata2 reached 100%. Because the PR is closed with merged_at null, curator should verify current source before recording this as a path fact.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path status update is directly visible in the diff, but merge/acceptance is not established.

source_update_candidates.title: Verify spline .sdata2 symbol-label ownership
source_update_candidates.text: The PR replaced HSD_Spline_804DE620-style global names with @number labels for twelve .sdata2 constants from 0x804DE620 to 0x804DE654, and the bot report claims spline .sdata2 reached 100%. Curator should verify current symbols and section ownership before recording these labels as accepted metadata.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol metadata changed as part of a closed, apparently unmerged PR; source verification is needed.

rejection_notes: Do not infer reviewer approval or merge acceptance; no reviews are loaded and merged_at is null.
Do not promote the bot report alone into a global standard that helper extraction or inline/static changes are generally preferred.
Do not treat the @number .sdata2 labels as current canonical names without checking current symbols.txt.
